item.title: Version 0.2.4
item.description: - Fixed the Settings action picker so Maximize and Full Screen persist and apply the selected mode immediately without crashing or lagging one click behind. - Cleaned up startup permission handling so signed development and release builds no longer emit false Accessibility/Input Monitoring denial churn before the event tap starts. - Verified the maximize and full-screen modes end to end against a real green-button click on TextEdit, in addition to the automated test suite.
